questionHtml: A throw is made once every minute. Estimate the average time required before a throw occurs where all coins are heads or all coins are tails.
markschemeHtml:
Two chances in 1024 so once every 512 throws ✓ 

512 throws take 8.5 h so (a reasonable estimate is half way through) on average 4.3 h ✓

meta.title: A throw is made once every minute. Estimate the average time required before a throw occurs where all coins are heads or all coins are tails.
